description: Pick a model backend (llama.cpp or Ollama), then browse, filter, and install AI models. Supports CSV direct install, interactive picker, live Ollama Hub search, and uninstall.

commands.(no args): Show the FULL combined catalog (llama.cpp + Ollama) with size, RAM, capabilities, ratings, and download paths
commands.help: Show this help screen plus current model download locations
commands.<csv-ids>: Direct install by id, e.g. qwen2.5-coder-3b,llama3.2
commands.download <n,m,k>: Install by catalog NUMBER (as printed by 'models list'), e.g. download 5,6,10  (also supports ranges: 5-8)
commands.list: Show full catalog (both backends) with rich line-by-line layout: size, RAM, [C]oding/[R]easoning/[W]riting/[V]oice/[M]ultilingual flags, and 1-10 ratings
commands.list <tag>: Filter by capability or sort tag, e.g. 'list coding', 'list voice', 'list speed'. Run 'models list --tags' for the full list
commands.list <tag1>,<tag2>: Filter by tag1 then sort by tag2 (and tag3...). Examples: 'list coding,speed' (coding models, fastest first), 'list code,speed,small' (coding, fast, then smallest)
commands.list --tags: Print every supported filter tag and its aliases
commands.search <query>: Search Ollama Hub (ollama.com/library) live and pick models to pull
commands.path: Show the resolved model download paths and current overrides
commands.path <dir>: Persist a SHARED model directory used by both backends (creates <dir>\models)
commands.path --reset [scope]: Clear persisted overrides. scope = all | shared | llama | ollama (default: all)
commands.uninstall: List locally installed models from BOTH backends, multi-select, delete
commands.uninstall llama: Uninstall picker scoped to llama.cpp GGUF files only
commands.uninstall ollama: Uninstall picker scoped to Ollama daemon models only

parameters.-Backend: Force a backend: llama-cpp or ollama (skips backend prompt; also scopes uninstall)
parameters.-Install: CSV of model ids/slugs to install non-interactively
parameters.-Force: Skip the 'yes' confirmation prompt during uninstall (for CI / scripts)

examples: .\run.ps1 models                          # show full catalog + download paths
.\run.ps1 models help                     # show this help
.\run.ps1 models list                     # rich table: size, RAM, ratings, best-for
.\run.ps1 models list llama
.\run.ps1 models download 5,6,10          # install by catalog number
.\run.ps1 models download 5-8             # install a range
.\run.ps1 models list coding             # filter: coding-capable models
.\run.ps1 models list coding,speed       # coding models sorted by speed (fastest first)
.\run.ps1 models list code,speed,small   # coding, fast, then smallest first
.\run.ps1 models list reasoning,best     # reasoning models, top quality first
.\run.ps1 models list voice              # all voice/audio models
.\run.ps1 models list --tags             # list every supported filter tag
.\run.ps1 models qwen2.5-coder-3b,llama3.2  # install by id
.\run.ps1 models -Backend ollama -Install llama3.2,qwen2.5-coder
.\run.ps1 models search phi3              # live Ollama Hub search
.\run.ps1 models path                     # show current model dirs + override hints
.\run.ps1 models path D:\ai              # set SHARED dir (both backends use D:\ai\models)
.\run.ps1 models path llama D:\gguf      # llama.cpp-only override
.\run.ps1 models path ollama D:\ollama   # Ollama-only override
.\run.ps1 models path --reset all         # clear all persisted overrides
$env:MODELS_DIR='X:\ai'                   # session-only shared override (highest priority)
$env:LLAMA_MODELS_DIR='X:\gguf'           # session-only llama override
$env:OLLAMA_MODELS='X:\ollama'            # session-only Ollama override
.\run.ps1 models uninstall
.\run.ps1 models uninstall ollama
.\run.ps1 models uninstall -Force

messages.pickBackend: Which model backend would you like to use?
messages.backendLlama: [1] llama.cpp  -- GGUF files, hardware-aware picker, runs offline (recommended)
messages.backendOllama: [2] Ollama     -- Managed daemon, simple pull/run, ~12 GB tooling
messages.csvNoneFound: None of the requested model ids matched any catalog. Use 'list' to see available ids.
messages.searchNoResults: Ollama Hub returned no results. Try a different query or check your connection.
messages.searchSkipped: No models selected from search results -- nothing to pull.
messages.uninstallScanning: Scanning local installations across both backends...
messages.uninstallNothing: No locally installed models found. Nothing to uninstall.
messages.uninstallAborted: Uninstall aborted by user. Nothing was deleted.
messages.uninstallSkipped: No selection made. Nothing was deleted.
messages.uninstallPartial: Uninstall finished with one or more failures -- review the log above.
